description: Golden vectors for Radiant Glyph script classifier. Samples drawn from the 500-block mainnet scan documented in ../../scripts/find_ft_utxo.py output (tip 420968 → 420469). Each 'source' field gives a real mainnet txid:vout for independent verification.

vectors.name: plain_p2pkh_large_coin
vectors.source: mainnet tx 72eb90d570807eb9ccf4ac99edc8a7c3e807f694dfde9fac37dc95a1118f04e8 vout[3] — change output to 1Cg55vEw8T4SWgJqeDs353LDwtNgndgNbH (an active mainnet RXD holder, unrelated to the Ledger test seed)

vectors.name: nft_singleton_63b_ledger_mint
vectors.source: mainnet tx 6c32fcbbd6834170b3afcb9bbed759eeb21db72fd509790a3cb804c6eb5c0630 vout[0] — FlipperHub NFT minted to Ledger address 1GT2rB99dRZd919Z1ZkFKZMRijDEu2D7DX (path m/44'/512'/0'/0/3), later spent by Ledger-signed tx 22d4e0e07200437791b48651125a636b994593b215152241aef7113b24b71da3. The mainnet proof of Ledger custody for Glyph UTXOs.

vectors.name: ft_holder_75b_262a4d95
vectors.source: mainnet tx 262a4d95c0e9b94bba85aa5382e69de36bb31053746aff8e740c7b4170d27fd4 vout[1] (75-byte FT holder, dominant token)

vectors.name: ft_holder_75b_6ce2bdb5_vout0
vectors.source: mainnet tx 6ce2bdb5f065dcc4d13a6eb1e1f5dc5e03af2733fb7ef7f78e07a450c8494f06 vout[0] (different FT token, confirms template generalizes across refs)

vectors.name: ft_holder_75b_6ce2bdb5_vout1
vectors.source: mainnet tx 6ce2bdb5... vout[1] (same tx, same token, different holder pkh — proves multi-recipient FT transfers work)

vectors.name: ft_control_241b_negative
vectors.source: mainnet tx 262a4d95... vout[0] (241-byte FT mint/control script — intentionally NOT spendable as P2PKH)
vectors.note: Classifier must NOT surface these as spendable. These are the mint-authority scripts that enforce FT mint rules — the wallet shouldn't try to sign them.

vectors.name: malformed_ft_wrong_tail
vectors.source: synthetic — 75 bytes, valid P2PKH head and bdd0 middle, but suffix bytes flipped
vectors.note: Template must be matched exactly — a different tail (e.g. a future variant) correctly falls through to 'unknown' rather than being misclassified.

vectors.name: malformed_nft_wrong_drop_byte
vectors.source: synthetic — byte at offset 37 is 0xff instead of the expected OP_DROP (0x75)

vectors.name: malformed_ft_wrong_length
vectors.source: synthetic — 74 bytes (missing one byte of tail)
